headline: Built for Buyers Who Sell Volume
sub: We work with wholesale accounts and individual customers alike — hardware stores, marine retailers, tool shops, and contractors who need reliable product they can resell or use on the job.
moq_details: Our MOQ is 25 units per SKU. You can mix and match products to hit this minimum. MOQs for some specialty or custom products may vary. Individual retail orders are also accepted for select products with no minimum.
lead_time: Standard production runs ship within 5-10 business days from order confirmation. Rush orders (2-3 days) are available for an additional fee when our production schedule allows. Reorders from existing files are typically faster.
payment_terms: New accounts: payment due at time of order. Established accounts with a 6-month order history may apply for Net 30 terms. We accept ACH, check, and major credit cards.
shipping: We ship via UPS and FedEx Ground. Freight available for large orders. All products are securely packaged for transit. Damage claims are handled promptly — we stand behind every shipment.
